query:
SELECT 
  o.orderNumber,
  o.currency,
  o.totalAmount,
  oi.productName,
  oi.quantity,
  oi.unitPrice,
  oi.subtotal
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.orderId
WHERE o.orderNumber = 'ORD-20260223-RT2';
